scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,auth,users,businesses,customers,jobs,products,pricing,billing,notify,files,orders,demo -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,white,gray,red,brightBlue,brightGreen,brightMagenta,brightCyan,brightYellow "npm run dev -w @blindscloud/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w @blindscloud/auth-service" "npm run dev -w @blindscloud/users-service" "npm run dev -w @blindscloud/businesses-service" "npm run dev -w @blindscloud/customers-service" "npm run dev -w @blindscloud/jobs-service" "npm run dev -w @blindscloud/products-service" "npm run dev -w @blindscloud/pricing-service" "npm run dev -w @blindscloud/billing-service" "npm run dev -w @blindscloud/notifications-service" "npm run dev -w @blindscloud/files-service" "npm run dev -w @blindscloud/orders-service" "npm run dev -w @blindscloud/demo-requests-service"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @blindscloud/models && npm run build -w @blindscloud/event-bus && npm run build -w @blindscloud/auth-service && npm run build -w @blindscloud/users-service && npm run build -w @blindscloud/businesses-service && npm run build -w @blindscloud/customers-service && npm run build -w @blindscloud/jobs-service && npm run build -w @blindscloud/products-service && npm run build -w @blindscloud/pricing-service && npm run build -w @blindscloud/billing-service && npm run build -w @blindscloud/notifications-service && npm run build -w @blindscloud/files-service && npm run build -w @blindscloud/orders-service && npm run build -w @blindscloud/demo-requests-service && npm run build -w @blindscloud/api-gateway
